narrative:
Precinct Scipio Township (precinct in Seneca County) has 764 registered voters, with 46.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.1 percentage points.
